creator: brian@utell.co.uk
text:
I wrote a little while ago and have no record of receiving a reply.
Is this now fixed ?  If you don't use cvsup/ctm, there's a current
copy of ppp on http://www.freebsd.org/~brian.

Thanks.
-- 
Brian <brian@awfulhak.org> <brian@freebsd.org>
      <http://www.awfulhak.org>
Don't _EVER_ lose your sense of humour !
